# WoPeD Next Project Memory

The user prefers concise, clear, and thorough technical explanations.
The user uses GitHub PRs for code changes and expects automated documentation updates.
The user works with a Vue 3 + Pinia + TypeScript codebase called WoPeD Next, a browser-based Petri net editor and workflow analysis tool.
New features in the project include UI branding updates, canvas improvements, operator notation changes, quick connect pad, token game dialogs, and PNML import fixes.
The user expects documentation updates for new composables, components, services, and features within the repo guidelines.
